name: Card File Attachment
description: A compact rich card used in RCS/ABC messaging to represent file, audio, image, video, or contact attachments. Supports download states, loading progress, error/retry flows, and a draft removal state.

headline.spec: Google Sans Flex Medium, 14sp, tracking 0, line-height 20sp

secondary.spec: Google Sans Text Regular, 12sp, tracking 0.1sp, line-height 16sp

timestamp.spec: Google Sans Text Regular, 12sp, tracking 0.1sp, line-height 16sp

variants.name: File / Generic / Stroke Off
variants.desc: Default file card. Shows drive_pdf icon in Secondary-colored 36dp rounded square, filename as headline, size+type as secondary text. No border.

variants.name: File / Generic / Stroke On
variants.desc: Same as above but adds Outline Variant border around the card.

variants.name: File / Download
variants.desc: Replaces icon with a 'download' Material Symbol. Signals file is available to download.

variants.name: File / Download expires
variants.desc: Replaces icon with a time-sensitive download symbol. Signals the download link will expire soon.

variants.name: File / Retry
variants.desc: Replaces icon with an error/retry symbol. Signals the download failed and user can retry.

variants.name: File / Generic and label
variants.desc: Generic state with the secondary (label) text row visible.

variants.name: Audio, Image, Video / (all states)
variants.desc: Same structure as File variants, but uses type-specific icons (audio, image, video Material Symbols) and type-specific error copy (e.g. 'Can't load audio').

variants.name: Contact
variants.desc: Replaces file icon with a 56dp avatar image. Headline shows contact name (uses On Error Container color in non-stroke state, On Surface in stroke state). Secondary shows 'View contact'.

variants.name: Loading
variants.desc: Replaces icon area with a 36dp circular determinate progress indicator (wave style, 50% progress, 4dp thickness) and a 'close' cancel symbol in Secondary color. Content area shows two skeleton placeholder lines (Surface Container Highest).

variants.name: File receipt icon
variants.desc: Standard file card with a 16dp read-receipt double-check icon overlaid at bottom-right (no stroke) or at a fixed offset (stroke variant).

variants.name: File draft
variants.desc: File card in sending/draft state with a remove badge (×) at the top-right corner for pre-send deletion.

variants.name: Photos card
variants.desc: Replaces the icon with a 56dp video thumbnail image (rounded 8dp). Headline shows media count (e.g. '1 video'). Secondary shows upload size. Google Photos logo in a white circular badge on the right.

behavior.interactive: Tap on the card body triggers the appropriate action: open file, play audio/video, view contact, or initiate download. The 'close' icon in Loading state cancels the upload/download. The remove badge (×) in File draft state removes the attachment before sending.
behavior.dynamic: Icon and copy change based on Type and State combination. Secondary text row visibility is controlled by the Metadata and Label boolean properties. Contact name color differs between stroke and no-stroke variants (On Error Container vs On Surface).
behavior.readReceipt: Visible only in the 'File receipt icon' variant. Rendered as a 16dp read-receipt icon at bottom-right of the card.

states: Card shows file icon, filename, and size/type label.
Download arrow icon shown; user can initiate download.
Time-sensitive download icon; indicates link expiry.
Error icon shown; user can retry failed download.
Circular progress + cancel icon; skeleton placeholder text.
Card with remove (×) badge; pre-send attachment state.
Generic state with secondary label text visible.

darkMode.notes: Dark values resolved from Material GenUX Kit v0.4.1 (gm3-color-tokens-full.css). The secondary palette shifts to a lighter blue (#7fcfff) in dark mode per M3 tonal palette conventions. On-error-container lightens to a soft pink (#f9dedc) in dark mode. Surface container darkens to near-black (#1e1f20).

writing: Use the actual filename including extension, e.g. 'file_name.pdf'. Keep concise.
Describe what failed, e.g. 'Can't load audio', 'Can't load file'.
Display the full contact name as stored.
Use media count format: '1 video', '3 photos'.
Use upload size format: '32 MB upload'.
a11y: Icon area should have a content description reflecting the file type and state (e.g. 'Audio file, tap to download').
Close icon should be labelled 'Cancel upload' or 'Cancel download'.
Remove (×) badge should be labelled 'Remove attachment'.
Read receipt icon should have an accessible label, e.g. 'Read'.
Avatar image should carry the contact name as its content description.
assets: PDF/file type icon rendered via Google Symbols font
Type-specific icons from Google Symbols font
Cancel/remove icon from Google Symbols font
Download action icon from Google Symbols font
Double-check mark overlay for read status
Google Photos four-color logo badge used in Photos card variant
56dp user avatar image for Contact variant
